title: Genie Agents enhancements
body:
* **Genie Spaces renamed to Genie Agents**: Genie Spaces are now called Genie Agents.
* **SQL expressions grouped with example SQL**: In the authoring experience, SQL expressions are now grouped with example SQL queries so you can define and manage both in one place. See [Define SQL expressions](/aws/en/genie/tune-quality#sql-expressions).
* **Consistent Genie Agent experience in Genie One**: In Genie One, a Genie Agent now opens as a chat if you have viewing rights only, or in the Analytics and AI workspace UI if you have authoring privileges. See [Use Genie One](/aws/en/genie-one/genie).
